action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "We are blocked from reaching the debugging APIs because the hostname 'program' does not resolve in this environment. Attempts via the corporate proxy return 502 Bad Gateway. Bypassing the proxy with --noproxy '*' results in DNS resolution failure for 'program'. The service is not on localhost:8008. Kubernetes DNS is functional (we can resolve kubernetes.default), but no DNS record exists for 'program' or plausible service FQDNs. Without a resolvable host or IP, we cannot call /checkpoint or /fix. To prepare for when the host becomes resolvable, we will create an automated script that, once it can reach the API, will: determine the total number of lines N using out-of-range detection, write N to /app/num_lines.txt, and then iteratively locate and fix all bugs with binary search guided by checkpoints until the full checkpoint passes. We'll also include limits on API calls and bypass proxies inside the script.",
  "plan": "1) Create a robust /app/debug_program.sh script that bypasses proxies, waits for the host to be resolvable, finds N via exponential search + binary search using 'out of range' messages, writes N to /app/num_lines.txt, and fixes bugs using checkpoint-guided binary search with targeted /fix calls until success at N. 2) Make the script executable. 3) Start a short polling loop that attempts to run the script once 'program' resolves. If DNS remains unresolved, we remain blocked but prepared to proceed immediately when it becomes available.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/debug_program.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
set -eu

# Bypass proxies
export no_proxy='*'
unset http_proxy https_proxy

HOST="${PROGRAM_HOST:-program}"
PORT="${PROGRAM_PORT:-8008}"
BASE="http://${HOST}:${PORT}"

fix_calls=0
checkpoint_calls=0

curl_base() {
  curl -s --noproxy '*' -H "Content-Type: application/json" "$@"
}

checkpoint() {
  line="$1"
  checkpoint_calls=$((checkpoint_calls+1))
  curl_base -d "{\"line\": ${line}}" "${BASE}/checkpoint"
}

fix_line() {
  line="$1"
  fix_calls=$((fix_calls+1))
  curl_base -d "{\"line\": ${line}}" "${BASE}/fix"
}

is_out_of_range() { echo "$1" | grep -qi 'out of range'; }
is_success() { echo "$1" | grep -q '"status"\s*:\s*"success"'; }
is_failure() { echo "$1" | grep -q '"status"\s*:\s*"failure"'; }

# Ensure host is resolvable
if ! getent hosts "$HOST" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Host $HOST not resolvable. Exiting." >&2
  exit 2
fi

# Find an upper bound that is out of range
lo=1
res="$(checkpoint "$lo")"
if is_out_of_range "$res"; then
  echo "Unexpected: out-of-range at 1" >&2
  exit 3
fi
hi=1
while :; do
  hi=$((hi*2))
  res="$(checkpoint "$hi")"
  if is_out_of_range "$res"; then
    break
  fi
  if [ "$hi" -ge 1048576 ]; then
    hi=1048576
    res="$(checkpoint "$hi")"
    break
  fi
  # Guard against too many checkpoint calls
  if [ "$checkpoint_calls" -ge 500 ]; then
    echo "Checkpoint call limit reached during upper bound search" >&2
    exit 4
  fi
done

# Establish lower bound as half of hi (which was not out-of-range)
lo=$((hi/2))

# Binary search to find exact N (largest line that is not out-of-range)
while [ $((hi - lo)) -gt 1 ]; do
  mid=$(((lo + hi) / 2))
  res="$(checkpoint "$mid")"
  if is_out_of_range "$res"; then
    hi="$mid"
  else
    lo="$mid"
  fi
  if [ "$checkpoint_calls" -ge 500 ]; then
    echo "Checkpoint call limit reached during N search" >&2
    exit 4
  fi
done
N="$lo"
printf "%s\n" "$N" > /app/num_lines.txt

# Fix bugs iteratively until checkpoint at N succeeds
attempt=0
while :; do
  res="$(checkpoint "$N")"
  if is_success "$res"; then
    echo "All bugs fixed. N=$N" >&2
    break
  fi
  # Find earliest bug with binary search on [1..N]
  low=1
  high="$N"
  while [ "$low" -lt "$high" ]; do
    mid=$(((low + high) / 2))
    res="$(checkpoint "$mid")"
    if is_success "$res"; then
      low=$((mid + 1))
    else
      high="$mid"
    fi
    if [ "$checkpoint_calls" -ge 500 ]; then
      echo "Checkpoint call limit reached during bug search" >&2
      exit 4
    fi
  done
  bug_line="$low"
  echo "Fixing bug at line $bug_line" >&2
  fix_line "$bug_line"
  attempt=$((attempt+1))
  if [ "$fix_calls" -ge 50 ]; then
    echo "Fix call limit reached ($fix_calls)." >&2
    exit 5
  fi
done

# Record API call counts
{
  echo "checkpoint_calls=$checkpoint_calls"
  echo "fix_calls=$fix_calls"
} > /app/api_counts.txt
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "chmod +x /app/debug_program.sh
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "for i in $(seq 1 60); do if getent hosts program >/dev/null; then echo 'program resolved, starting debug'; PROGRAM_HOST=program PROGRAM_PORT=8008 /app/debug_program.sh; break; else echo 'waiting for program host...'; sleep 1; fi; done
",
      "duration": 60.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
